problem_text_cn: ν mol理想气体准静态过程中，摩尔热容量C=[V₀-2(1+1/γ)V]/(V₀-4V) Cₚ，Cₚ为定压摩尔热容量，γ为绝热指数。体积从V₀增为2V₀时，求气体对外作功W（V₀时温度T₀）。
problem_text_en: For ν moles of ideal gas in a quasi-static process, the molar heat capacity C=[V₀-2(1+1/γ)V]/(V₀-4V) Cₚ，where Cₚ is the molar heat capacity at constant pressure and γ is the adiabatic index. Find the work W done by the gas when the volume increases from V₀ to 2V₀（temperature T₀ at V₀）.
problem_solution_cn: （1）过程方程推导：- 热力学第一定律与理想气体状态方程联立，化简得dV/(V-V₀/2)=dp/p，积分得p=2p₀V/V₀ - p₀（p₀=νRT₀/V₀）。（2）对外作功计算：- 功W=∫V₀²V₀ p dV，代入p的表达式积分，得W=2νRT₀。
problem_solution_en: （1）Derivation of process equation：- Combining the first law of thermodynamics and the ideal gas state equation, simplifying gives dV/(V-V₀/2)=dp/p，integrating gives p=2p₀V/V₀ - p₀（p₀=νRT₀/V₀）。（2）Calculation of work done externally：- Work W=∫V₀²V₀ p dV，substituting the expression of p and integrating，we get W=2νRT₀。
problem_answer: 气体对外作功$W=2 u R T_0$
